parents.subject: LU-19079 nodemap: compute sha256 of nodemap name

commit.subject: LU-19079 nodemap: add rhashtable on sha256 of name
commit.message:
LU-19079 nodemap: add rhashtable on sha256 of name

Add a new rhashtable on struct lu_nodemap, based on the nm_sha field
(sha256 of the nodemap name). This allows efficiently looking up a
nodemap based on the sha256 of its name.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-sec
Signed-off-by: Sebastien Buisson <sbuisson@ddn.com>
